contact_lookup_status: Named recruiter verified from the official Schwarz Digits posting page on 2026-03-27.
job_title: Werkstudent / Praktikant (m/w/d) Cloud FinOps - Technical Cost Optimization & Analytics
why_company: Schwarz Digits stands out to me because this role sits exactly between technical depth, analytics, and measurable business impact. That is the direction I want to develop further through practical work in a structured environment.
job_description: Schwarz Digits is hiring a working student or intern in Cloud FinOps with a focus on technical cost optimization and analytics. The role supports cost transparency, analytical evaluation of cloud usage, optimization opportunities, collaboration with technical teams, and structured reporting in a cloud-native environment.
requirements: Interest in cloud-native systems and technical cost optimization
Analytical mindset and comfort with data-driven work
Ability to support reporting, dashboards, and structured analysis
Strong communication with technical and business stakeholders
Interest in building technical depth through real operational work
Student profile aligned with business informatics, software engineering, or adjacent technical-business programs
Excel, PowerPoint, analytics, cloud, cost optimization, reporting, governance
cv_about_override: Business analysis and product professional building stronger technical depth in analytics, systems-oriented work, and digital operations.
cv_summary_override: Experienced product and business analysis professional with a strong foundation in research, requirements, stakeholder alignment, and structured execution. Alongside my earlier business background, I am now deepening my technical path through Software Engineering studies at Heilbronn University and Business Information Systems studies at Vietnamese-German University. My hands-on work across SQL, automation, AI-assisted workflows, and digital operations has strengthened my interest in systems-oriented analysis, technical decision support, and measurable operational improvement.
cover_letter_opening: I am applying for the position of Werkstudent / Praktikant (m/w/d) Cloud FinOps - Technical Cost Optimization & Analytics at Schwarz Digits. This role stands out to me because it combines technical learning, analytical thinking, and measurable business impact in exactly the direction I want to develop further.
cover_letter_body_one: My background began more on the business and product side, but my academic path and recent work have moved me steadily toward technical analysis and systems-oriented problem solving. In past roles, I worked across digital products and operations-heavy environments where I had to understand systems, structure requirements clearly, support implementation, and translate operational problems into practical actions.
cover_letter_body_two: What makes this role especially attractive is the opportunity to build stronger depth in technical analysis and cloud-related cost optimization. Through my current Software Engineering studies at Heilbronn University, my Business Information Systems background, and my hands-on work across SQL, automation, AI-assisted workflows, and digital operations, I have been intentionally moving toward more technical and system-oriented work. I am not positioning myself as a finished cloud specialist already, but as someone with a strong analytical and operational foundation who can contribute while learning fast in a technical environment.
cover_letter_motivation: I am particularly interested in Schwarz Digits because Cloud FinOps connects architecture awareness, cost discipline, analytics, and operational execution. That combination matches both my existing strengths and the technical direction I am actively building toward.
